content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-047)

## §1 — MAJOR (lvb flatteningstratification): reconcile `lem:gf_qcoh_finite_sections_globally_generated` prose vs Lean
The pinned Lean `gf_qcoh_finite_sections_globally_generated` is MORE GENERAL than the blueprint prose (Lean: any qcoh epi `π:G⟶F` over Spec R with `[Module.Finite R Γ(G)]`; prose: the free epi `O_V^{⊕I}↠F`). The free-epi-matching helper `gf_qcoh_finite_sections_of_free_epi` is unpinned. Review added a `% NOTE:` flagging this. **Plan action — pick one** (mirrors iter-046 annihilator generalisation):
- (a) generalise the prose to "any qcoh epi with finite source sections" to match the pin, AND add a separate block pinning `gf_qcoh_finite_sections_of_free_epi` for the free-epi specialisation; OR
- (b) re-pin `lem:gf_qcoh_finite_sections_globally_generated` to `gf_qcoh_finite_sections_of_free_epi` (prose already matches) and add a NEW block for the general form.
Option (a) preferred (keeps the more-general lemma visible in the DAG). Blueprint-writer dispatch on `Picard_FlatteningStratification.tex`.

## §2 — GF G1: NOT proof-fillable yet — decompose seam 1 + build the transport FIRST
**Do NOT re-dispatch a prover at `gf_finiteType_affine_finite_cover_generated` or `gf_qcoh_fintype_finite_sections` as-is** (Mathlib-absent, confirmed by direct API search). Required prep before any prover lane:
- **effort-break seam 1** into 3 sub-lemmas matching the missing primitives: (i) `GeneratingSections`/`LocalGeneratorsData` restriction along `D(g)↪σ.X i`; (ii) topological refinement of an arbitrary open cover of an affine `W` to a FINITE standard-basic-open subfamily (`PrimeSpectrum.isBasis_basic_opens` + affine⟹quasi-compact) — **most self-contained, start here**; (iii) finite-generation-on-D(g) ⟹ free epi `O_{D(g)}^{⊕I}↠F|`. Cover-extraction analogue `QuotScheme.exists_finite_basicOpen_cover_le_quasicoherentData` is a model.
- **Build the X.Modules↔Spec transport** (separate lane): an `X.Modules` affine-local restatement of `gf_qcoh_finite_sections_of_free_epi`, via the QUOT gap1 `overRestrictEquiv`/opaque-immersion recipe — **keep the affine immersion OPAQUE** to dodge the whnf runaway (memory `quot-gap1-closed-opaque-immersion`).
- Then G1 assembly: seam 1 → transport per D(g) → locality half `gf_finite_sections_of_basicOpen_finite_cover` (DONE). `genericFlatness` @L2360 stays gated on G1 + G3 — leave it.
- **G3** (`gf_flat_locality_assembly`): blueprint stub still thin (iter-047 deferred must-fix-1). Expand before any G3 prover.

## §3 — SNAP layer 1: build the stalkwise-iso criterion before the associator
`tensorPowAdd` is the sole layer-1 frontier gap. **DO-NOT-RETRY** hand-rolling the associator as an isolated sorry. Build ONE of (effort-break candidate):
- (1) a stalkwise-iso ⟹ `IsIso` criterion for `X.Modules` (sheaves of modules over a scheme) morphisms, then apply to `sheafification (η_P ⊗ 𝟙_Q)`, wrap as `tensorObjAssoc`, then `tensorPowAdd` by the induction (base case + step both otherwise ready: `tensorObjUnitIso`, `tensorBraiding`, `tensorPow_succ` built); OR
- (2) the full `MonoidalCategory X.Modules` instance via reflective-localization monoidal transport — port `CategoryTheory.Sites.Monoidal` (does this for `Sheaf J A`/fixed monoidal `A`) to `SheafOfModules`.
Route (1) is the lighter prep. Then SNAP layers 2-3 (`sectionsMul` lax-monoidal Γ, graded assembly) unblock.

## §4 — Coverage debt: 11 unmatched `lean_aux` nodes need blueprint blocks
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 11 (all this iter). Planner to author blocks (review does not write prose):
- **SectionGradedRing.lean** (10): `sheafification` (`:= PresheafOfModules.sheafification (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)`; underpins `def:sheafTensorObj`), `MonoidalPresheaf` (defeq repackaging of `X.PresheafOfModules`; could be `% NOTE`-only), `unitModule` (`:= SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf`; wraps mathlibok `lem:moduleUnit_mathlib`), `sheafificationCounitIso` (reflective counit; = step 1 of `tensorPowAdd`), `tensorObjUnitIso` (left unitor; `tensorPowAdd` base case), `tensorObjRightUnitor`, `tensorBraiding` (braiding; `tensorPowAdd` step), simp `tensorPow_zero`/`tensorPow_succ`/`moduleTensorPow_zero` (defeq unfolders, minor).
- **FlatteningStratification.lean** (1): `gf_qcoh_finite_sections_of_free_epi` — free-epi affine base case (see §1; suggest pinning under the reconciled seam-3 block). Deps: `tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor`, `tilde.adjunction`, `Module.Finite.of_surjective`, `ModuleCat.epi_iff_surjective`.

## §5 — closest-to-completion / promising
- **Closest**: SNAP `tensorPowAdd` (everything but the associator is built — one criterion away) and the GF G1 transport (the gap1 recipe is a known template). Both prep-gated, not proof-fillable as-is.
- **Solved/ready to consume**: `gf_affine_qcoh_Gamma_epi`, `gf_qcoh_finite_sections_globally_generated`, `gf_qcoh_finite_sections_of_free_epi` (GF affine base case complete over Spec R); `tensorObj`/`tensorPow`/`moduleTensorPow` + 7 SNAP helpers.

## §6 — blocked (do NOT re-assign without structural change)
- `gf_finiteType_affine_finite_cover_generated`, `gf_qcoh_fintype_finite_sections` — Mathlib-absent (§2); effort-break + transport build first.
- `tensorPowAdd` — Mathlib-absent associator (§3); stalkwise criterion first.
- `genericFlatness` (@L2360) — gated on G1 + G3.
- **FBC keystone `_legs_conj`** — PARKED (un-park trigger: GF base case + SNAP land ≈iter 050, or a lane frees). Off critical path.
